creator: glarkin@FreeBSD.org
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

Hi Jurgen,

I have made some stylistic changes to the Makefile, and I am now trying
to test Archiva under Tomcat 6.0.  I have found a few problems and would
like to know if you will submit a new patch to fix them?

- - Missing dependencies for java/javamail and java/jaf
- - Missing Derby database dependency (requires a new port)

There may be some other helpful information here, too:

http://cwiki.apache.org/confluence/display/ARCHIVA/Archiva+on+Tomcat

Thanks very much for creating the port.  It looks like a good addition
to the tree!

Cheers,
Greg
- --
Greg Larkin

http://www.FreeBSD.org/       - The Power To Serve
http://www.sourcehosting.net/ - Ready. Set. Code.
